name: Peoplein Limited
analysis: PPE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.6950, stop A$0.6138, target A$0.8000 (1.29:1) — then trail it.
